subject: Daily Standup Summary - March 1
body:
**Daily Standup Summary – March 1, 2026**

**Yesterday's Completed Items**
• Merged PR #1427: Database query optimization for user profile endpoints
• Completed unit test coverage for auth module (92% coverage)
• Refactored legacy payment processor integration
• Resolved 3 GitHub issues from backlog

**Today's Planned Work**
• Continue feature branch for new dashboard analytics module
• Code review and merge remaining PRs in current sprint
• Update Python dependencies to latest patch versions
• QA testing on staging environment for recent releases
• Documentation updates for API changes

**Blockers**
• Awaiting access credentials for staging database (Legal/DevOps)
• One PR blocked pending security review
• Need clarification on acceptance criteria for analytics feature

**Quick Notes**
• Sprint velocity on track
• No critical production issues
• Team availability: all present today

Reach out if you need details on any items above.
